name: spindev-devenv
description: Developer-machine setup for spinlockdevelopment — hardened-shell Docker sandbox (hshell launcher), ubuntu-debloat (fresh Ubuntu dev-box bringup with Chrome, Brave, Docker, mise, Android Studio, VS Code), and create-gh-token (mint and wire a per-project fine-grained GitHub PAT into the git remote). Enable on boxes where you actually set up or sandbox dev environments; skip on Claude Code Web.
